hook_text: Free trials fail. Proof of value doesn't.
body:
Most HR software companies offer 14-day free trials.

And most of those trials end without a decision.

Why? Because in 14 days, you haven't run a real payroll cycle. You haven't hit a WPS deadline. You haven't had an actual compliance question.

You've just clicked around a demo environment.

We built SmartPRO Hub's trial differently.

Day 1: We import your real employee data (we handle it).
Day 3: You run your first WPS file — with your actual numbers.
Day 7: Your HR manager uses it for real leave approval.
Day 14: You've lived one payroll cycle inside the system.

At day 14, the question isn't "should we try it?"
It's "why would we go back?"

That's proof of value. Not a feature tour.

---

The best demos use real data. Every time.

Would you run a real trial or a sandbox? What makes the difference for you?
cta: DM "TRIAL" to start with your real data.
